text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp has finally come to an end...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer. After we get back home...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, it has nothing to do with training, but
there's something I want to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'll let you know when I'm ready, so just be
prepared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our next race will begin as soon as summer ends!
